summary: Merged ADR 0302 onto `main` as repository version `0.177.113` and first verified platform version `0.130.75`, with Restic-backed encrypted file-level backups now live on `docker-runtime-lv3` for `receipts/`, `config/`, `versions/stack.yaml`, and the controller-local secret manifest. The live verification bundle re-confirmed the MinIO-backed repository, the managed systemd timer, the controller-side backup and restore automation entrypoints, the event-driven live-apply backup path, and the backup-coverage ledger evidence. During verification, an unrelated Windmill worker-checkout refresh intermittently removed mirrored repo files on `docker-runtime-lv3`, so the successful event-driven live-apply proof set includes one documented manual sync of the new runner and catalog before the passing backup run.

verification.observed: The merged ADR 0302 tree passed `make syntax-check-restic-config-backup`, focused pytest for the Restic and backup-ledger slices (`17 passed`), `./scripts/validate_repo.sh workstream-surfaces agent-standards`, both Restic `make preflight` workflows, and `make backup-coverage-ledger`.

`sudo systemctl start lv3-restic-config-backup.service` completed with `Result=success`, `lv3-restic-config-backup.timer` remained active and enabled on `docker-runtime-lv3`, and `mc version info local/restic-config-backup` reported that versioning is enabled for the MinIO-backed Restic bucket.

`make restic-config-backup env=production` produced `receipts/restic-backups/20260331T060131Z.json` with 4 protected and 1 inactive governed sources, and `make restic-config-restore-verify env=production` produced `receipts/restic-restore-verifications/20260331T055701Z.json` with `result: pass` and `restored_file_count: 2468`.

After one documented manual worker sync of the new runner and Restic catalog, the live-apply-trigger backup path succeeded and produced `receipts/restic-backups/20260331T055348Z.json`, covering the event-driven `config` and `versions_stack` sources without leaving uncovered Restic-governed paths.

`make backup-coverage-ledger` wrote `receipts/backup-coverage/20260331T060217Z.json`, and the final ledger continued to surface only the unrelated existing gaps for `monitoring-lv3` freshness and the still-unconfigured `lv3-backup-offsite` path for `backup-lv3`.

notes: This receipt records the first verified `main`-integrated platform promotion for ADR 0302.

The live backup proof set intentionally preserves the unrelated Windmill worker-mirror churn evidence instead of hiding it; ADR 0302 is recorded as live because the managed timer, controller automation, and event-driven backup path all succeeded with documented receipts.
The final backup coverage ledger still shows `monitoring-lv3` and `backup-lv3` as uncovered for pre-existing reasons outside ADR 0302.
